description: Enhance the Admin Panel with real backend integration. Replace the hardcoded mock data in /api/health and /api/stats with real patterns that attempt to ping actual app health endpoints and query Prisma for real user counts. Add new API routes: /api/users (query Prisma User model), /api/apps/[id]/restart (restart endpoint), /api/services/[id]/logs (service logs). Also wire the cross-app notification dispatch and search integration into the admin panel so it can broadcast notifications and search across all apps.
steps: Rewrite apps/admin/src/app/api/health/route.ts: Instead of hardcoded array, attempt to fetch health endpoints from known app ports (use Promise.allSettled with timeout). Map known apps to their ports from a config (quantmail:3000, quantchat:3001, quantdrive:3002, etc.). If fetch fails, mark as 'down'. Include real timestamp.

Rewrite apps/admin/src/app/api/stats/route.ts: Import PrismaClient from @prisma/client (or use a shared Prisma instance pattern). Query actual counts: SELECT COUNT(*) from users table. For active users, count where lastLoginAt > 24h ago. Return real numbers where possible, gracefully fallback to 0 if DB unavailable.

Create apps/admin/src/app/api/users/route.ts: GET endpoint that queries Prisma for users with pagination (page, pageSize query params). Return id, email, username, displayName, role, status, createdAt, lastLoginAt. Follow the ApiResponse pattern used in quantmail.

Create apps/admin/src/app/api/apps/[id]/restart/route.ts: POST endpoint that accepts an app id, looks up its port, and sends a restart signal (for now, just return success with a simulated restart response since we cannot actually restart processes from an API route).

Create apps/admin/src/app/api/services/[id]/logs/route.ts: GET endpoint that accepts a service id, returns recent log entries. Since we cannot read actual log files in this context, return structured log data from the health server endpoint of that service.

Create apps/admin/src/app/api/notifications/broadcast/route.ts: POST endpoint that uses the NotificationFanout from @quant/notifications to dispatch a notification to all users or specific user groups. Accept { title, body, recipientIds, priority } in the body.
Create apps/admin/src/app/api/search/route.ts: GET endpoint with ?q= param that uses the CrossAppSearch from @quant/search to search across the ecosystem and return unified results.

Update apps/admin/next.config.mjs to add serverExternalPackages and webpack externals for Node.js packages (same pattern as quantchat's next.config.js) to handle @prisma/client and other server-side imports.
Run `pnpm turbo build --filter=@quant/admin` and `pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/admin` to verify everything compiles.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/health returns dynamic data (attempts real health checks)
GET /api/stats queries Prisma for user counts
GET /api/users returns paginated user list from Prisma
